name: Cool 'n Easy Lemon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the boiling water into the JELL-O in a large bowl until dissolved.
2. Mix the cold water and ice to make 1 ¼ cups. Gradually add this mixture to the gelatin, stirring until slightly thickened (consistency of unbeaten egg whites).
3. Remove any remaining ice.
4. Stir in the tub COOL WHIP with a wire whisk until smooth. Refrigerate for 10 to 15 minutes or until the mixture is very thick and will mound.
5. Spoon the chilled mixture into the crust. There may be some leftover.
6. Refrigerate for 4 hours or until firm.
7. Garnish each slice with a lemon slice and a dollop of COOL WHIP just before serving.
